name: Indian Coconut Rice Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the 2 cups of long grain rice in water.
2. In a separate pot, bring together the 2 cups of coconut milk and 1.5 cups of water to a boil. Add 1 teaspoon of grated fresh ginger and continue boiling.
3. Drain the soaked rice, then return it to the pot with the boiling coconut milk mixture. Bring back to a boil, cover, and turn off the heat.
4. In another pan, heat the 4 tablespoons of oil until hot. Add the black mustard seeds and stir until they pop. Add the dried red chilies and brown them.
5. Add the sesame seeds and brown lightly.
6. Pour the flavored oil mixture and salt over the rice. Toss in the flaked fresh coconut (or dried unsweetened coconut that has been soaked).
